location: On a corpse seated against the north wall inside the Abandoned Church, in the southeast of Abyssal Woods (an optional deep-late-game area). The Church Ruins Site of Grace is inside the same building.

source.name: Corpse against the north wall inside the Abandoned Church

tactics: Reaching Abyssal Woods requires going through Shadow Keep's Castle Watering Hole, then Darklight Catacombs, into Forsaken Graveyard, then south through the arch into Abyssal Woods proper — a long, easy-to-get-lost optional detour.
From the Forsaken Graveyard grace, follow the dirt path south past rats to the Map: Abyss stele; the Abandoned Church sits right behind it.
No fight is required for the bottle itself — it's a plain corpse loot inside the church, near the altar where 2 Scadutree Fragments also sit.
Abyssal Woods is a fog-heavy, disorienting area with hidden threats; don't confuse the Abandoned Church with other ruined structures scattered through the woods.
lore: Another product of the realm's wandering perfumers and their endless hunt for new aromatics, but this one was rigged to unleash the maddening Frenzied Flame instead of any pleasant scent.

builds.name: Universal Madness proc weapon
builds.why: Very low requirements (3/10/12/12) and flat E-D scaling mean it's cheap to wield on almost any build purely for its fixed 60 Madness buildup, useful as an off-hand status tool regardless of your main damage stat.
